attribution.changes: Statements formalized (translated) into Lean 4 by parZer; proofs are conditional on the disclosed sorry-stubs.
attribution.title: Explicit birational geometry of threefolds of general type

nodes.label: sigmaB
nodes.lean: def sigmaB (B : Multiset (ℕ × ℕ)) : ℕ := (B.map Prod.fst).sum

nodes.label: sigmaP
nodes.lean: def sigmaP (B : Multiset (ℕ × ℕ)) : ℚ := (B.map (fun p => (p.1 : ℚ) ^ 2 / (p.2 : ℚ))).sum

nodes.label: Delta_br
nodes.lean: def Delta_br (n b r : ℕ) : ℤ := let i : ℤ := ((b * n) / r : ℕ); i * b * n - (i ^ 2 + i) / 2 * r

nodes.label: DeltaB
nodes.lean: def DeltaB (n : ℕ) (B : Multiset (ℕ × ℕ)) : ℤ := (B.map (fun p => Delta_br n p.1 p.2)).sum

nodes.label: FormalBasket
nodes.lean:
structure FormalBasket where
  basket : Multiset (ℕ × ℕ)
  chi : ℤ
  P2 : ℤ

nodes.label: K3B
nodes.lean: def K3B (Bf : FormalBasket) : ℚ := -(sigmaB Bf.basket : ℚ) + sigmaP Bf.basket + 6 * (Bf.chi : ℚ) + 2 * (Bf.P2 : ℚ)

nodes.label: Pm
nodes.lean: opaque Pm : ℕ → FormalBasket → ℤ

nodes.label: BasketPacking
nodes.lean:
def BasketPacking (B B' : Multiset (ℕ × ℕ)) : Prop :=
  ∃ b₁ r₁ b₂ r₂ R, B = (b₁, r₁) ::ₘ (b₂, r₂) ::ₘ R ∧ B' = (b₁ + b₂, r₁ + r₂) ::ₘ R

nodes.label: lem_reid_plurigenus_formula
nodes.lean: theorem lem_reid_plurigenus_formula : ∀ (X : PaperVariety), IsMinimal X → IsGeneralType X → Terminal X → ∀ (m : ℕ), 1 < m → (PX m X : ℚ) = (1 / 12) * (m : ℚ) * ((m : ℚ) - 1) * (2 * (m : ℚ) - 1) * Vol X - (2 * (m : ℚ) - 1) * (chiX X : ℚ) + lCorr m (BasketOf X) := by sorry

nodes.label: lem_fletcher_l_monotone
nodes.lean: theorem lem_fletcher_l_monotone : ∀ (B : Multiset (ℕ × ℕ)) (m : ℕ), 2 ≤ m → lCorr (m + 2) B - lCorr m B - lCorr 2 B ≥ 0 := by sorry

nodes.label: lem_cc_vol_chi_le0
nodes.lean: theorem lem_cc_vol_chi_le0 : ∀ (X : PaperVariety), IsMinimal X → IsGeneralType X → chiX X ≤ 0 → Vol X ≥ 1 / 30 := by sorry

nodes.label: lem_fletcher_chi1_p12p24
nodes.lean: theorem lem_fletcher_chi1_p12p24 : ∀ (X : PaperVariety), IsMinimal X → IsGeneralType X → chiX X = 1 → 1 ≤ PX 12 X ∧ 2 ≤ PX 24 X := by sorry

nodes.label: lem_chenhacon_q_pos
nodes.lean: theorem lem_chenhacon_q_pos : ∀ (X : PaperVariety), IsMinimal X → IsGeneralType X → 0 < qX X → (∀ m, 2 ≤ m → 0 < PX m X) ∧ (∀ m, 7 ≤ m → BirationalPhi m X) := by sorry

nodes.label: lem_formal_basket_pm_seed
nodes.lean: theorem lem_formal_basket_pm_seed : ∀ (Bf : FormalBasket), Pm 2 Bf = Bf.P2 ∧ Pm 3 Bf = -(sigmaB Bf.basket : ℤ) + 10 * Bf.chi + 5 * Bf.P2 := by sorry

nodes.label: lem_formal_basket_pm_recursion
nodes.lean: theorem lem_formal_basket_pm_recursion : ∀ (Bf : FormalBasket) (m : ℕ), 3 ≤ m → 2 * (Pm (m + 1) Bf - Pm m Bf) = (m : ℤ) ^ 2 * (-(sigmaB Bf.basket : ℤ) + 6 * Bf.chi + 2 * Bf.P2) + (m : ℤ) * (sigmaB Bf.basket : ℤ) - 4 * Bf.chi + 2 * DeltaB m Bf.basket := by sorry

nodes.label: lem_assumptions_bundle
nodes.lean: theorem lem_assumptions_bundle : AssumptionsBundle := by sorry

nodes.label: lem_kawamata_viehweg
nodes.lean: theorem lem_kawamata_viehweg : KVVanishing := by sorry

nodes.label: lem_mpcps_movable_restrict
nodes.lean: theorem lem_mpcps_movable_restrict : MPCPSRestrict := by sorry

nodes.label: lem_bombieri_reider_bpf
nodes.lean: theorem lem_bombieri_reider_bpf : BombieriReiderBPF := by sorry

nodes.label: lem_viehweg_semipos
nodes.lean: theorem lem_viehweg_semipos : ViehwegSemipos := by sorry

nodes.label: lem_tableA_completeness
nodes.lean: theorem lem_tableA_completeness : TableAComplete := by sorry

nodes.label: lem_tableB_completeness
nodes.lean: theorem lem_tableB_completeness : TableBComplete := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_volume
nodes.lean: theorem thm_volume (h0 : IsGeneralType X) (h1 : 0 < m0) (h2 : 2 ≤ PX m0 X) : ((TypeIII X → Vol X ≥ 10 / ((m0 : ℚ) ^ 2 * (3 * (m0 : ℚ) + 2))) ∧ (TypeII X → Vol X ≥ 4 / ((m0 : ℚ) ^ 2 * (3 * (m0 : ℚ) + 2))) ∧ (TypeI3 X → Vol X ≥ 36 / (5 * (m0 : ℚ) * ((m0 : ℚ) + 2) ^ 2)) ∧ Vol X ≥ 11 / (12 * (m0 : ℚ) * ((m0 : ℚ) + 1) ^ 2)) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_packing
nodes.lean: theorem thm_packing : (∀ (b1 r1 b2 r2 : ℕ) (Rest : Multiset (ℕ × ℕ)), 0 < r1 → 0 < r2 → 2 * b1 ≤ r1 → 2 * b2 ≤ r2 → (∀ n, 2 ≤ n → DeltaB n ((b1, r1) ::ₘ (b2, r2) ::ₘ Rest) ≥ DeltaB n ((b1 + b2, r1 + r2) ::ₘ Rest)) ∧ sigmaB ((b1, r1) ::ₘ (b2, r2) ::ₘ Rest) = sigmaB ((b1 + b2, r1 + r2) ::ₘ Rest) ∧ sigmaP ((b1, r1) ::ₘ (b2, r2) ::ₘ Rest) = sigmaP ((b1 + b2, r1 + r2) ::ₘ Rest) + ((r1 : ℚ) * b2 - (r2 : ℚ) * b1) ^ 2 / ((r1 : ℚ) * r2 * (r1 + r2))) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_addition
nodes.lean:
theorem thm_addition : (∀ (m b r : ℕ), 1 < m → 2 * b ≤ r → Nat.Coprime b r → sigmaB ({(m * b, m * r)} : Multiset (ℕ × ℕ)) = sigmaB (Multiset.replicate m (b, r)) ∧ sigmaP ({(m * b, m * r)} : Multiset (ℕ × ℕ)) = sigmaP (Multiset.replicate m (b, r)) ∧ (∀ n, 0 < n → DeltaB n ({(m * b, m * r)} : Multiset (ℕ × ℕ)) = DeltaB n (Multiset.replicate m (b, r)))) := by
  have h_0 : ∀ (m b r : ℕ), sigmaB ({(m * b, m * r)} : Multiset (ℕ × ℕ)) = sigmaB (Multiset.replicate m (b, r)) := by intro m b r; simp [sigmaB, Multiset.map_replicate, Multiset.sum_replicate]
  have h_1 : ∀ (m b r : ℕ), 1 < m → sigmaP ({(m * b, m * r)} : Multiset (ℕ × ℕ)) = sigmaP (Multiset.replicate m (b, r)) := by intro m b r h1; simp only [sigmaP, Multiset.map_singleton, Multiset.sum_singleton, Multiset.map_replicate, Multiset.sum_replicate, nsmul_eq_mul]; push_cast; rw [mul_pow]; rw [show (m:ℚ) ^ 2 * (b:ℚ) ^ 2 = (m:ℚ) * ((m:ℚ) * (b:ℚ)^2) from by ring, mul_div_mul_left _ _ (show (m:ℚ) ≠ 0 by positivity), mul_div_assoc]
  have h_2 : ∀ (m b r : ℕ), 1 < m → ∀ n, 0 < n → DeltaB n ({(m * b, m * r)} : Multiset (ℕ × ℕ)) = DeltaB n (Multiset.replicate m (b, r)) := by intro m b r h1; intro n hn; simp only [DeltaB, Multiset.map_singleton, Multiset.sum_singleton, Multiset.map_replicate, Multiset.sum_replicate, nsmul_eq_mul]; simp only [Delta_br]; rw [show (m * b * n) / (m * r) = (b * n) / r from by rw [Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.mul_div_mul_left _ _ (show 0 < m by omega)]]; push_cast; ring
  exact fun m b r hm hbr hcop => ⟨h_0 m b r, h_1 m b r hm, h_2 m b r hm⟩

nodes.label: thm_p2m
nodes.lean: theorem thm_p2m (h0 : IsMinimal X) (h1 : IsGeneralType X) (h2 : Terminal X) (h3 : chiX X = 1) : (∀ (m : ℕ), 2 ≤ m → PX (m + 2) X ≥ PX m X + PX 2 X) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_volume_chi_1
nodes.lean: theorem thm_volume_chi_1 (h0 : IsMinimal X) (h1 : IsGeneralType X) (h2 : chiX X = 1) : (Vol X ≥ 1 / 420) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_vol
nodes.lean: theorem thm_vol (h0 : IsGeneralType X) : (Vol X ≥ 1 / 2660) := by sorry

title: Explicit birational geometry of threefolds of general type
